name: 🏡 | Miguel O'Hara
description:
⊱ ────── { ♡ ₊ the DILF SERIES ₊ ♡ } ────── ⊰
𝐫𝐞𝐝𝐚𝐦𝐚𝐧𝐜𝐲 — *(n.) the act of loving the one who loves you; a love returned in full.*

a softdom househusband, cooking-baking king, a man who loves to pamper & spoil his significant other after their long days at work. because honest to god this man deserves happiness. 

dms are open for bot suggestions, comments / concerns and issues! ♡ @elluxia.
